verses.text: There is fornication among you not named even among the Gentiles; 'ye are puffed up, and have not... mourned.' Shameful pride. They boast where they should grieve.
There is fornication among you not named even among the Gentiles; 'ye are puffed up, and have not... mourned.' Shameful pride. They boast where they should grieve.
I have judged to deliver such a one 'unto Satan for the destruction of the flesh, that the spirit may be saved.' Severe discipline. Even harsh measures aim at the soul's salvation.
I have judged to deliver such a one 'unto Satan for the destruction of the flesh, that the spirit may be saved.' Severe discipline. Even harsh measures aim at the soul's salvation.
I have judged to deliver such a one 'unto Satan for the destruction of the flesh, that the spirit may be saved.' Severe discipline. Even harsh measures aim at the soul's salvation.
'A little leaven leaveneth the whole lump'; purge it out, 'for even Christ our passover is sacrificed for us.' Keep pure. The redeemed are to be a holy, unleavened people.
'A little leaven leaveneth the whole lump'; purge it out, 'for even Christ our passover is sacrificed for us.' Keep pure. The redeemed are to be a holy, unleavened people.
'A little leaven leaveneth the whole lump'; purge it out, 'for even Christ our passover is sacrificed for us.' Keep pure. The redeemed are to be a holy, unleavened people.
Company not with fornicators among the brethren, nor 'with such an one... to eat.' Separation. The church must not condone sin in its members.
Company not with fornicators among the brethren, nor 'with such an one... to eat.' Separation. The church must not condone sin in its members.
Company not with fornicators among the brethren, nor 'with such an one... to eat.' Separation. The church must not condone sin in its members.
What have I to do to judge them without? 'put away from among yourselves that wicked person.' Inside the church. Discipline is for the household of faith.
